title: Every One of Us Has a Dream

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Not at all. I was just watching the others train.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Each and every one of the people here has a
goal—a dream they're working toward. That's why
they're putting forth their very best effort.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
We too have our own dreams to chase, so we
can't afford to give anything less than our best,
can we?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Yeah.
Well, should we get started?
